props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the progress bar.

props.name: ariaLabelledBy
props.description: ID of the element that labels this progress bar.

props.name: percentVisibility
props.description: Controls visibility of the percentage text.

props.name: progress
props.description: Progress value (0-100). When undefined, shows an indeterminate loading animation.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.
